title: Skill Testing, Safety, Versioning, and Maintenance · Transfer Build
summary: Build a regression suite for a skill and its helper scripts. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a skill test and release harness with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Test workflow outcomes under normal, boundary, and failure prompts.
Unit-test helper scripts and verify safe behavior in temporary fixtures.
Review skill scripts, dependencies, file scope, and requested permissions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Local MCP protocol and tool-contract portfolio."""

  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]

steps.title: Defend the transferred model
